transcript.question: What should I order tonight?
transcript.answer: Popular starting points include carne asada tacos, carnitas tacos, al pastor tacos, regular burritos, Cubana torta, chimichangas. The full menu is here: https://www.canva.com/design/DAFiva54Na0/0FUdTRi1uYaiwKx25OqRew/view.

transcript.question: When are you open?
transcript.answer: Sunday: 10:00 am – 9:00 pm; Monday – Thursday: 10:00 am – 9:00 pm; Friday – Saturday: 10:00 am – 10:00 pm. Hours can change, so call (847) 426-0506 if timing is tight.

transcript.question: Can I order pickup?
transcript.answer: For pickup, you can call (847) 426-0506 or start from the online order link: https://www.restaurantji.com/order.php?id=3429883. Call the restaurant for timing, substitutions, or price-sensitive questions.

transcript.question: Do you have gluten free?
transcript.answer: For allergy or ingredient questions, please call (847) 426-0506 before ordering. I can point you to menu favorites, but the restaurant should confirm ingredients directly.

transcript.question: Where are you located?
transcript.answer: La Hacienda Mexican Restaurant is at 411 E Main St, East Dundee, IL 60118. Use directions here: https://www.google.com/maps/dir/?api=1&destination=411+E+Main+St,+East+Dundee,+IL+60118.
